title: N8N Bot trading with weights, python with rtx 5090
author: handle-wo
selftext:
Hey folks,

after being a silent reader for a long time I just wanted to share, that I used genetic algorithm (python) to search for the best weights for indicators to trade BTC. I used rsi, macd, volume etc and used my rtx 5090 to find out the best performing weights. I found out, that the best weights for 2021 also working pretty well in 2025. I calculated the exact fees in, the result is +80% for 2025 backtest so far (in 2021 it was +300%). I also searched for the best 2025 weights which only gave around +70%.

After weeks of working/testing/improving it, I'm finally ready to see what the result for the next week's/months is. I'm using a leverage on bybit (20x), because the trades are short term trades between less +- percentages.

Always my bot trades, I get a telegram notification.

I used python for backtest/live data testing and a rest API server handling N8N requests and giving the signals.

In N8N I'm asking every 15min the API for the signal, if it's "hold" it does nothing, if it's sell or buy it closed the last trade and opens a new one (like in the backtest software).

I'll keep u updated if somebody is out there who's interested, wish me luck.
